# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
    "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
    "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
    "parameters": {
        "appName": {
            "type": "string",
            "metadata": {
                "description": "The name of the Azure Function App."
            }
        },
        "location": {
            "type": "string",
            "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
            "metadata": {
                "description": "The location for the resources."
            }
        },
        "storageAccountForFunctionName": {
            "type": "string",
            "metadata": {
                "description": "The name of the storage account used by the Function App for its operations (must be globally unique)."
            }
        },
        "storageAccountForFunctionAppSkuName": {
            "type": "string",
            "defaultValue": "Standard_LRS",
            "allowedValues": [
                "Standard_LRS",
                "Standard_GRS",
                "Standard_RAGRS"
            ],
            "metadata": {
                "description": "The SKU for the storage account used by the Function App."
            }
        },
        "appServicePlanName": {
            "type": "string",
            "metadata": {
                "description": "The name of the App Service Plan for the Function App."
            }
        },
        "appServicePlanSkuName": {
            "type": "string",
            "defaultValue": "Y1",
            "allowedValues": [
                "Y1",
                "B1",
                "S1",
                "P1V2"
            ],
            "metadata": {
                "description": "The SKU for the App Service Plan (Y1 for Consumption, B1/S1/P1V2 for dedicated)."
            }
        },
        "targetStorageAccountId": {
            "type": "string",
            "metadata": {
                "description": "The full resource ID of the existing target Storage Account to grant access to (e.g., /subscriptions/{subId}/resourceGroups/{rgName}/providers/Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/{storageName})."
            }
        },
        "targetKeyVaultId": {
            "type": "string",
            "metadata": {
                "description": "The full resource ID of the existing target Key Vault to grant access to (e.g., /subscriptions/{subId}/resourceGroups/{rgName}/providers/Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/{keyVaultName})."
            }
        },
        "targetSqlDatabaseId": {
            "type": "string",
            "metadata": {
                "description": "The full resource ID of the existing target SQL Database to grant access to (e.g., /subscriptions/{subId}/resourceGroups/{rgName}/providers/Microsoft.Sql/servers/{serverName}/databases/{dbName})."
            }
        },
        "targetCosmosDbAccountId": {
            "type": "string",
            "metadata": {
                "description": "The full resource ID of the existing target Cosmos DB Account to grant access to (e.g., /subscriptions/{subId}/resourceGroups/{rgName}/providers/Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts/{cosmosName})."
            }
        }
    },
    "variables": {
        "functionAppApiVersion": "2022-03-01",
        "appServicePlanApiVersion": "2022-03-01",
        "storageAccountApiVersion": "2023-01-01",
        "roleAssignmentApiVersion": "2022-04-01",

        "contributorRoleDefinitionId": "/subscriptions/[subscription().id]/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/b24988ac-6180-42a0-ab88-20f7382dd24c",
        "keyVaultAdministratorRoleDefinitionId": "/subscriptions/[subscription().id]/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/00482a5a-887f-4fb3-b363-3b7fe8e74677",
        "sqlDBContributorRoleDefinitionId": "/subscriptions/[subscription().id]/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/9231298c-28d7-4074-a629-952c938a9a41",
        "cosmosDBBuiltinDataContributorRoleDefinitionId": "/subscriptions/[subscription().id]/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/c0ff603e-1b84-44b5-828b-b72e29e98a10"
    },
    "resources": [
        {
            "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts",
            "apiVersion": "[variables('storageAccountApiVersion')]",
            "name": "[parameters('storageAccountForFunctionName')]",
            "location": "[parameters('location')]",
            "sku": {
                "name": "[parameters('storageAccountForFunctionAppSkuName')]"
            },
            "kind": "StorageV2",
            "properties": {
                "supportsHttpsTrafficOnly": true,
                "minimumTlsVersion": "TLS1_2"
            }
        },
        {
            "type": "Microsoft.Web/serverfarms",
            "apiVersion": "[variables('appServicePlanApiVersion')]",
            "name": "[parameters('appServicePlanName')]",
            "location": "[parameters('location')]",
            "sku": {
                "name": "[parameters('appServicePlanSkuName')]"
            },
            "properties": {
                "reserved": true
            }
        },
        {
            "type": "Microsoft.Web/sites",
            "apiVersion": "[variables('functionAppApiVersion')]",
            "name": "[parameters('appName')]",
            "location": "[parameters('location')]",
            "kind": "functionapp",
            "identity": {
                "type": "SystemAssigned"
            },
            "dependsOn": [
                "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', parameters('appServicePlanName'))]",
                "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountForFunctionName'))]"
            ],
            "properties": {
                "serverFarmId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', parameters('appServicePlanName'))]",
                "siteConfig": {
                    "appSettings": [
                        {
                            "name": "AzureWebJobsStorage",
                            "value": "[concat('DefaultEndpointsProtocol=https;AccountName=', parameters('storageAccountForFunctionName'), ';AccountKey=', listKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountForFunctionName')), variables('storageAccountApiVersion')).keys[0].value, ';EndpointSuffix=', environment().suffixes.storage)]"
                        },
                        {
                            "name": "FUNCTIONS_EXTENSION_VERSION",
                            "value": "~4"
                        },
                        {
                            "name": "FUNCTIONS_WORKER_RUNTIME",
                            "value": "dotnet"
                        },
                        {
                            "name": "WEBSITE_CONTENTAZUREFILECONNECTIONSTRING",
                            "value": "[concat('DefaultEndpointsProtocol=https;AccountName=', parameters('storageAccountForFunctionName'), ';AccountKey=', listKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountForFunctionName')), variables('storageAccountApiVersion')).keys[0].value, ';EndpointSuffix=', environment().suffixes.storage)]"
                        },
                        {
                            "name": "WEBSITE_CONTENTSHARE",
                            "value": "[toLower(parameters('appName'))]"
                        },
                        {
                            "name": "WEBSITE_RUN_FROM_PACKAGE",
                            "value": "1"
                        }
                    ]
                },
                "httpsOnly": true
            }
        },
        {
            "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
            "apiVersion": "[variables('roleAssignmentApiVersion')]",
            "name": "[guid(resourceGroup().id, parameters('appName'), parameters('targetStorageAccountId'), variables('contributorRoleDefinitionId'))]",
            "scope": "[parameters('targetStorageAccountId')]",
            "dependsOn": [
                "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('appName'))]"
            ],
            "properties": {
                "roleDefinitionId": "[variables('contributorRoleDefinitionId')]",
                "principalId": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('appName')), variables('functionAppApiVersion')).identity.principalId]",
                "principalType": "ServicePrincipal"
            }
        },
        {
            "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
            "apiVersion": "[variables('roleAssignmentApiVersion')]",
            "name": "[guid(resourceGroup().id, parameters('appName'), parameters('targetKeyVaultId'), variables('keyVaultAdministratorRoleDefinitionId'))]",
            "scope": "[parameters('targetKeyVaultId')]",
            "dependsOn": [
                "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('appName'))]"
            ],
            "properties": {
                "roleDefinitionId": "[variables('keyVaultAdministratorRoleDefinitionId')]",
                "principalId": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('appName')), variables('functionAppApiVersion')).identity.principalId]",
                "principalType": "ServicePrincipal"
            }
        },
        {
            "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
            "apiVersion": "[variables('roleAssignmentApiVersion')]",
            "name": "[guid(resourceGroup().id, parameters('appName'), parameters('targetSqlDatabaseId'), variables('sqlDBContributorRoleDefinitionId'))]",
            "scope": "[parameters('targetSqlDatabaseId')]",
            "dependsOn": [
                "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('appName'))]"
            ],
            "properties": {
                "roleDefinitionId": "[variables('sqlDBContributorRoleDefinitionId')]",
                "principalId": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('appName')), variables('functionAppApiVersion')).identity.principalId]",
                "principalType": "ServicePrincipal"
            }
        },
        {
            "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
            "apiVersion": "[variables('roleAssignmentApiVersion')]",
            "name": "[guid(resourceGroup().id, parameters('appName'), parameters('targetCosmosDbAccountId'), variables('cosmosDBBuiltinDataContributorRoleDefinitionId'))]",
            "scope": "[parameters('targetCosmosDbAccountId')]",
            "dependsOn": [
                "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('appName'))]"
            ],
            "properties": {
                "roleDefinitionId": "[variables('cosmosDBBuiltinDataContributorRoleDefinitionId')]",
                "principalId": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('appName')), variables('functionAppApiVersion')).identity.principalId]",
                "principalType": "ServicePrincipal"
            }
        }
    ],
    "outputs": {
        "functionAppPrincipalId": {
            "type": "string",
            "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('appName')), variables('functionAppApiVersion')).identity.principalId]"
        }
    }
}
